title: AI Listing Presentation Prep — Research & Plan
close_reason: Research complete. Plan at docs/listing-presentation-prep-plan.md. Discord command (!prep <address>) triggers Trestle API queries for subject property, closed comps (6mo), active competition, pending count. Calculates price/sqft, absorption rate, months of supply, DOM/price trends. Generates suggested price range + AI talking points. PDF via S3 presigned URL optional. Shares Trestle client and comp engine with CMA epic (bd-2mb). Blocked on Trestle credentials (bd-2mb.7).

title: Market Pulse Digest — Daily MLS Intelligence Bot
description: Research complete. Daily/weekly MLS digest delivered to Discord. Queries Trestle API for changes in target North Texas zip codes (new listings, price reductions, pending, sold, expired, back on market). Adds AI insights per listing. Weekly summary with trends, absorption rate, inventory. Shares Trestle client infrastructure with CMA and Lead bot. Full plan at docs/market-pulse-digest-plan.md. Requires IDX Plus feed minimum for sold data.
close_reason: Broker already receives daily market pulse info — no need to build this

title: AI CMA Generator - Trestle MLS Integration
Trestle API Research & CMA Build Plan
description: Research complete. Deep review on 2026-03-10 identified 11 gaps in original plan (Section 12 of docs/cma-generator-plan.md): (1) Rate limiting must be baked into API client — token bucket, dynamic header reading, 429 backoff, per-CMA call budgeting. (2) Missing active listings + pending sales analysis. (3) Texas is non-disclosure state — MLS is only source of sold data. (4) Seller concessions distort ClosePrice. (5) Distressed sales need filtering/flagging. (6) Adjustment values should be derived from data, not hardcoded. (7) DOM context for comp weighting. (8) Subject property may not be in MLS — need manual input fallback. (9) Comp ranking needs subdivision weight increase, subtype matching, age bands. (10) Report needs confidence indicators. (11) Updated API call budget: 4-6 calls per CMA. Bridge API research also added (Section 11).
close_reason: Research complete. Plan documented with 12 sections covering API details, gaps, and corrections.

title: Phase 1: Trestle API Client (auth, query builder, media)

title: Research: PDF Generation Skill for CMA Reports
AI Lead Qualification & Routing Bot
description: Research complete. Discord-first approach — broker interacts via Discord channel. Paste address → property analysis. Paste lead → scoring. Request full CMA → PDF generated via weasyprint, uploaded to S3, presigned URL posted in Discord (7-day expiry). Trestle API for property data. Full plan at docs/lead-qualification-bot-plan.md.
